No Poverty.reason: There is no explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus that relates to eradicating poverty or its various dimensions.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content does not provide any evidence related to ending hunger, improving nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No information in the syllabus pertains to health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It equips students with language skills for 'life and work' (Target 4.4) and fosters 'humanistic literacy,' 'knowledge of Japanese society and history,' 'international perspective,' and 'cross-disciplinary expertise' (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The syllabus does not contain any specific objectives or activities related to promoting gender equality or empowering women and girls.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or objectives related to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus offers no content or objectives related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop 'language skills for life and work' and 'professional competitiveness,' directly contributing to employability and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the syllabus relates to industrialization, innovation, infrastructure development, or technological upgrading.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's core competency 'international mobility' (國際移動力) directly supports individuals' capacity for the mobility of people, aligning with Target 10.7.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Fostering 'knowledge of Japanese society and history culture' and 'understanding Japan through Japanese learning' contributes to appreciating and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'use genuine books' (務必使用正版書籍) promotes ethical consumption, a minor link to sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: The syllabus does not contain any content or objectives related to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable use of marine resources.

Life on Land.reason: The course does not address terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fostering 'humanistic literacy,' 'knowledge of Japanese society and history culture,' and an 'international perspective' contributes to intercultural understanding, a foundation for peaceful and inclusive societies (Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing an 'international perspective' (國際觀) and 'international mobility' (國際移動力) equips students for global interactions and knowledge exchange, foundational for international partnerships (Target 17.6).
